title: An Act to Create Parity in Poultry Processing and Farming Licenses and Inspections
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 6, 2025
last_house_action: 4/10/2025 - Committee on Agriculture, Conservation and Forestry suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/6/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
